_comment: Hand-maintained leaderboard manifest — the single source of truth for which run each board shows. Each key is an env id (matching a coverage card's data-env in index.html); its value maps a secondary-tab label -> either a run path relative to the env dir ('<commit-dir>/run_<n>[_cfg].json') or the literal 'pending' for a coming-soon placeholder tab. Tab order follows key order; an env with one config shows no tabs. Labels are free text (e.g. 'w/ mcp'). To add/update a board: drop the run JSON under assets/exps/eval/<env>/<commit-dir>/ and point its label here. This '_comment' key is ignored by the site.
